title: Noble Hamilton
role_summary: 2023 CRFW Fund nominee (outcome unconfirmed); photographer at nobleonephotos.com.
body:
# Noble Hamilton

Photographer; runs `nobleonephotos.com`. Nominated for the 2023 CRFW Fund cycle. Per the email summary: "evidently his dad was an influential Black DPS principal and ran for state Senate at one time, a mover and shaker; his mom struggles with untreated bi-polar. Noble lives with her." Was one of four 2023-cycle candidates discussed; outcome (granted vs. not) not yet recorded.

## Source

- Gmail thread `189f5e407e08005a` — "Fwd: CRFW Fund - Grant Cycle" (August 2023)
